Abnormal RNA stability in amyotrophic la._cohort_update_rationale: GSE115310/Nat Commun paper includes C9ALS, sporadic ALS (sALS), and healthy control patient-derived cell cohorts.

Neurovascular dysfunction in GRN-associa._cohort_update_rationale: FTD-GRN and control human cerebral cortex cohorts in GSE163122/Nat Neurosci paper.

Unexpected similarities between C9ORF72._cohort_update_rationale: Primary eLife paper stratifies postmortem ALS/FTD samples into C9ALS/FTD, like-C9 sporadic ALS/FTD, like-control sporadic ALS/FTD, and non-ALS control analytic cohorts based on hnRNP H-target splicing signatures.

Truncated stathmin-2 is a marker of TDP-._cohort_update_rationale: Primary JCI paper evaluates truncated STMN2 across FTLD-TDP cases, PSP/FTLD-tau disease controls, and controls; broad disease labels in sample annotations are not the analytic cohort grouping.

Postmortem Cortex Samples Identify Disti._cohort_update_rationale: Current disease annotations list ALS, FTD, Control, Pre-fALS, Alzheimer's Disease, Other Neurological Disorders, and Other Motor Neuron Disease.

Divergent impacts of C9orf72 repeat expa._cohort_update_rationale: Nat Commun paper Methods state the bulk H3K27ac ChIP-seq studies used a separate group of C9-ALS donors and normal/control donors with no remarkable pathology.
C9-ALS, C9-FTD, and control postmortem cortex cohorts in GSE219278/Nat Commun paper.
C9-ALS, C9-FTD, and control postmortem cortex cohorts in GSE219279/Nat Commun paper.
C9-ALS, C9-FTD, and control postmortem cortex cohorts in GSE219280/Nat Commun paper.

Loss of Nuclear TDP-43 Is Associated wit._cohort_update_rationale: GSE126541 ATAC-seq design compares neuronal nuclei that retained TDP-43 versus neuronal nuclei that lost TDP-43, extracted from FTD/ALS patient postmortem frontal cortex; healthy controls and HeLa validation experiments are not the primary deposited ATAC-seq cohorts.

GSE126542 RNA-seq design compares neuronal nuclei that retained TDP-43 versus neuronal nuclei that lost TDP-43, extracted from FTD/ALS patient postmortem frontal cortex; healthy controls and HeLa validation experiments are not the primary deposited RNA-seq cohorts.

RNA methylation influences TDP43 binding._cohort_update_rationale: Deposited SRP413231/PRJNA912644 RNA-seq data contain HEK293T DART-seq experimental treatment/control groups from BioSample treatment metadata: Apobec-YTH, Apobec-YTHmut, and Halo.

Trehalose Expanded Access Protocol Datas._cohort_update_rationale: Trehalose expanded-access protocol; open-label non-randomized treatment cohort.

ASSESS ALL ALS Dataset._cohort_update_rationale: ASSESS ALL ALS prospective observational study enrolling symptomatic ALS and control participants.

PREVENT ALL ALS Dataset._cohort_update_rationale: ALL ALS paper describes PREVENT ALL ALS as enrolling asymptomatic participants at risk for genetic ALS; control participants are described under ASSESS ALL ALS rather than as a dedicated PREVENT cohort.

Trehalose Biomarker Dataset._cohort_update_rationale: Trehalose expanded-access biomarker dataset; open-label non-randomized treatment cohort.

A Study to Evaluate Efficacy Safety and._cohort_update_rationale: Phase 2 randomized dose-ranging trial: placebo plus 150, 300, and 450 mg reldesemtiv arms.

A Study to Evaluate the Efficacy and Saf._cohort_update_rationale: COURAGE-ALS Phase 3 randomized trial: reldesemtiv and placebo arms.

ALS Analysis and Assessment Survey Study._cohort_update_rationale: ALS Analysis and Assessment Survey Study is a survey/registry-style observational dataset.

Clinical Trial Ceftriaxone in Subjects W._cohort_update_rationale: Ceftriaxone ALS trial was a multi-stage randomized placebo-controlled trial with placebo, ceftriaxone 2 g/day, and ceftriaxone 4 g/day arms across stages.
OMOP representation of the ceftriaxone ALS multi-stage randomized placebo-controlled trial with placebo, ceftriaxone 2 g/day, and ceftriaxone 4 g/day arms.

ALS Compute Dataset._cohort_update_rationale: dbGaP collection phs003184.v1.p1 describes ALS Compute as a centralized multi-study ALS/FTD WGS case-control collection including cases and controls across four authorized-access studies.

Clinical Trial of Topiramate in ALS._cohort_update_rationale: Neurology 2003 randomized placebo-controlled ALS trial randomized participants to topiramate treatment or placebo.

Target ALS._cohort_update_rationale: Target ALS is an ongoing observational longitudinal natural-history study enrolling ALS participants diagnosed at participating ALS clinics and healthy control participants, with clinical data and biospecimens collected for molecular datasets.

Developing Novel Strategies for Personal._cohort_update_rationale: Title and annotations describe an ALS case/control cohort (dbGaP phs004288.v1.p1).
